title: Sodium Balanced
description: Sodium Balanced is an ultra-lightweight optimization modpack focus on Sodium, Fast noise, Lithium, C2me and Krypton as core performance boosters.
body:
Sodium Balanced is an ultra-lightweight optimization modpack focus on Sodium, lithium, c2me and krypton as core performance boosters with Iris Shaders support include. 
It works seamlessly on Vanilla clients and connects perfectly to Vanilla servers.
The concep idea of this modpack is to be ultralight and efficient without too much bloat mantaining the vanilla style.

Fabric and neoforge supported.
